steps.title: Substitute the expression for $y$
steps.content: The second equation gives $y=9x+1$. Substitute into $8x+y=5$: $$8x+(9x+1)=5.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is correct. The other choices do not make the two equations have the same $y$-value. In Desmos, the two lines intersect at an $x$-coordinate of $\frac{4}{17}$.
